title: dacryodes afzelii
intro: Dacryodes afzelii, also known as the African oil palm, is a species of palm tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Dacryodes afzelii include the treatment of fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, as well as the relief of pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including oil, powder, and infusion, which are often used in traditional medicine.
